Read AGENTS.md and docs/modules/module_178_residual_cube.md.

Create Module 179: Fourier major/minor decomposition for the residual derivative cube endpoint.

Use status STRUCTURAL / EXTRACTION unless you prove both major and minor estimates in the required range.

Must include:
- definitions of f, B_d, c_d, B_d^circ, Q_d, Omega_w;
- spectral identity for nonzero frequencies;
- major/minor arc split;
- exact local model requirements;
- why pair-BDH and first-moment HL are insufficient;
- edge cases;
- project-map location;
- what remains open.
